default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Marcel Santilli (GrowthX Labs) and Andi Bailey (growthx.ai) to discuss client communication strategies and account management.](https://fathom.video/share/GLeZh6yHtPXT3ge5KyMFdadyRFzUrh_H?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Planning to send a client memo to address feedback and tease upcoming Atlas features](https://fathom.video/share/GLeZh6yHtPXT3ge5KyMFdadyRFzUrh_H?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Shifting focus towards strategic conversations and delivering promised value to clients](https://fathom.video/share/GLeZh6yHtPXT3ge5KyMFdadyRFzUrh_H?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Marcel prefers to concentrate on new accounts and strategy sprints, while team handles existing account improvements](https://fathom.video/share/GLeZh6yHtPXT3ge5KyMFdadyRFzUrh_H?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [Identified need for better initial client onboarding and question-asking processes](https://fathom.video/share/GLeZh6yHtPXT3ge5KyMFdadyRFzUrh_H?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)

## Topics

### Social Media Presence

  - [Marcel nervous about posting on X (Twitter) due to lower engagement](https://fathom.video/share/GLeZh6yHtPXT3ge5KyMFdadyRFzUrh_H?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [More comfortable and active on LinkedIn](https://fathom.video/share/GLeZh6yHtPXT3ge5KyMFdadyRFzUrh_H?tab=summary&timestamp=43.0)
  - [Highlights personal branding challenges for executives](https://fathom.video/share/GLeZh6yHtPXT3ge5KyMFdadyRFzUrh_H?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)

### Client Communication Strategy

  - [Draft client memo prepared to address feedback and unhappy clients](https://fathom.video/share/GLeZh6yHtPXT3ge5KyMFdadyRFzUrh_H?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [Memo aims to:](https://fathom.video/share/GLeZh6yHtPXT3ge5KyMFdadyRFzUrh_H?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
      - [Acknowledge imperfections](https://fathom.video/share/GLeZh6yHtPXT3ge5KyMFdadyRFzUrh_H?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
      - [Tease Atlas features](https://fathom.video/share/GLeZh6yHtPXT3ge5KyMFdadyRFzUrh_H?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
      - [Reassure clients of ongoing improvements](https://fathom.video/share/GLeZh6yHtPXT3ge5KyMFdadyRFzUrh_H?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
      - [Reset expectations at organizational level](https://fathom.video/share/GLeZh6yHtPXT3ge5KyMFdadyRFzUrh_H?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Deep dives scheduled for some clients (e.g., Rapid, potentially Superhuman)](https://fathom.video/share/GLeZh6yHtPXT3ge5KyMFdadyRFzUrh_H?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [Directors working on scheduling strategic conversations](https://fathom.video/share/GLeZh6yHtPXT3ge5KyMFdadyRFzUrh_H?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)

### Account Management Challenges

  - [Fixing accounts more draining for Marcel than strategy sprints](https://fathom.video/share/GLeZh6yHtPXT3ge5KyMFdadyRFzUrh_H?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [Inner Well case study: Difficult to get full picture, time-consuming, involves multiple stakeholders](https://fathom.video/share/GLeZh6yHtPXT3ge5KyMFdadyRFzUrh_H?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Preference for Jason to lead account rescue efforts, allowing Marcel to focus on new accounts and repeatability](https://fathom.video/share/GLeZh6yHtPXT3ge5KyMFdadyRFzUrh_H?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)

### Improving Client Onboarding

  - [Andi took over Inner Well account in last two days](https://fathom.video/share/GLeZh6yHtPXT3ge5KyMFdadyRFzUrh_H?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
  - [Identified lack of proper stage-setting and insufficient questioning during onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/GLeZh6yHtPXT3ge5KyMFdadyRFzUrh_H?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Jacob (assumed team member) finding clarity through recent changes](https://fathom.video/share/GLeZh6yHtPXT3ge5KyMFdadyRFzUrh_H?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)

### Team Responsibilities

  - [Shift towards team handling existing account improvements](https://fathom.video/share/GLeZh6yHtPXT3ge5KyMFdadyRFzUrh_H?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [Marcel to provide high-level guidance without direct involvement in rescue efforts](https://fathom.video/share/GLeZh6yHtPXT3ge5KyMFdadyRFzUrh_H?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [Focus on translating strategy sprint insights to director-level implementation across accounts](https://fathom.video/share/GLeZh6yHtPXT3ge5KyMFdadyRFzUrh_H?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Finalize and send client memo to address feedback and set new expectations](https://fathom.video/share/GLeZh6yHtPXT3ge5KyMFdadyRFzUrh_H?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Continue scheduling and conducting deep dives with specific clients](https://fathom.video/share/GLeZh6yHtPXT3ge5KyMFdadyRFzUrh_H?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [Implement improved onboarding process with more thorough questioning](https://fathom.video/share/GLeZh6yHtPXT3ge5KyMFdadyRFzUrh_H?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Transition account rescue efforts to Jason and team, with Marcel providing oversight](https://fathom.video/share/GLeZh6yHtPXT3ge5KyMFdadyRFzUrh_H?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [Develop system for translating strategy sprint insights to broader account implementation](https://fathom.video/share/GLeZh6yHtPXT3ge5KyMFdadyRFzUrh_H?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)

action_items.description: Finalize and send client memo addressing feedback, teasing Atlas, acknowledging issues, outlining improvement steps
